channel.title: Posts on Neeraj Adhav
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Neeraj Adhav

item.title: Trial First Post
item.description: Standard Markdown Paragraphs This document is itself written using Markdown. Markdown allows you to write using an easy-to-read, easy-to-write plain text format, which then converts to valid HTML. Header Header 1 Header 2 Header 6 $$\sum_{i=0}^n i^2 = \frac{(n^2+n)(2n+1)}{6}$$ $$\sum_{i=0}^n i^2 = \frac{(n^2+n)(2n+1)}{6}$$ $$∑i=0ni2=(n2+n)(2n+1)6$$ $$∑i=0ni2=(n2+n)(2n+1)6$$
